rationale: No conflict. Elec. Code §253.096 governs campaign contributions by corporations/labor organizations in measure elections; it is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A corporation or labor organization may make campaign contributions from its own property in connection with an election on a measure only to a political committee for supporting or opposing measures exclusively.
_note: Rule concerns campaign finance procedure, not property tax exemption levels. No interaction with proposed change.
